summary_zh: 今日AI进展：讨论重心集中在 AI Industry 与 Model Capability。Top10 关键人物仍在推动“模型能力产品化 + 发布反馈闭环”，全网高影响博主均值分约 0.583。
summary_en: Daily AI progress: discussion centers on AI Industry and Model Capability. Top voices keep focusing on productizing model capability and iterating via publish-feedback loops.

trend_items.latest_viewpoint_zh: 最新观点：NEWS: For the first time, NVIDIA’s AI supercomputers will be built entirely in the U.S. — working with leading manufacturing partners to design and build factories. Production has also started for NVIDIA Blackwell chips at TSMC’s chip plant（主题：AI Industry）
